outcome_notes: R.S.T. run: won Weather Watch (⚡⚡★ 2/3 — Time Pod failed), Countdown Ridge (★/★★), Thunderbolt Grid (★⚡). Rep 3. Died at Disintegration Flats (4th mission, grid hit 0). Turn 3 had a -448k re-solve that recovered to 102k — some kind of mid-turn cascade. 3948 civilians, 30m07s. All patches from this session ran cleanly: auto_turn 45s poll, phantom-attack guard (fired for Leaper1 — Lua fallback didn't catch it), spawn penalty, silenced warnings.
